lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: Hello yourself, outerlander. A little out of the way up here, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: I would love to stop and chat with you, but unfortunately we have a custom that no Fremennik may speak with the outerlanders without the permission of our chieftain.

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: Don't take it personally. The Chieftain is stood just over there, his name is Brundt. I suggest you go and introduce yourself.

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: You wouldn't want to go making any enemies because you weren't aware of our customs now, would you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I guess not. Thanks anyway.

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: Not a problem, outerlander. It's always nice to see a new face in the Longhall; it happens so rarely.

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: Hello again [Fremennik name]. I suppose you want a drink? Or are you going to try another scam with that terrible Askeladden again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Scam? Oh... You mean his promise not to come in here anymore?

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: Yes. Yes I do. I should never have trusted him not to come in here, even with that written promise.

lines.speaker: Thora the Barkeep
lines.text: Anyway, do you want a drink or not?
